items.title: Two US troops killed and one missing after Iranian attack in Jordan
items.dek: The announcement comes after Jordan said it intercepted 10 Iranian missiles fired into its airspace overnight into Saturday.
items.body: The announcement comes after Jordan said it intercepted 10 Iranian missiles fired into its airspace overnight into Saturday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Indian police forcibly hospitalize a prominent Cockroach Party activist on hunger strike
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hungary's president agrees to stand down after parliament backs removal
items.dek: Tamás Sulyok, seen as an Orbán loyalist, had until Saturday night to agree to end his term.
items.body: Tamás Sulyok, seen as an Orbán loyalist, had until Saturday night to agree to end his term.
items.author: IriLine Desk
